# Future Ideas

Minimal fixture for `/sig:add` Slice 1 tests. Mirrors the shape of the real `.planning/FUTURE-IDEAS.md` (heading → entries separated by `---` → trailing `*Last updated:*` footer) but kept short for snapshot stability.

Append new ideas; promote to a milestone file when ready to build.
